details.user_visible_error: none - page stayed on welcome screen
details.page_behavior: Frontend did not transition to chat view. Text remained in input field. URL stayed at /app (not /app/chat/...).
details.console_errors: CSP violations: Refused to connect (Content Security Policy), Loading image violates img-src directive

recommendation: hold_request=1 did not resolve CSP issue. StreamGenerate was intercepted and webchannel template returned, but Gemini CSP blocks APF response content. Gemini frontend silently fails - no error shown, no chat transition. Need to either: (1) match exact Gemini webchannel response format including proper CSP-compliant headers, or (2) use GOAWAY to force connection reset instead of template injection.
